scripts.dev:web: npm run client && npm run dev --workspace @merida/web
scripts.dev:extension: npm run client && npm run dev --workspace @merida/extension
scripts.check:generated: npm run generate && git diff --exit-code -- packages/api-client/openapi.json packages/api-client/src/generated
scripts.client: npm run generate && npm run build --workspace @merida/api-client
scripts.lint: eslint apps/web/src apps/extension/src packages/ui/src packages/api-client/src/index.ts packages/api-client/src/operatorError.ts scripts && prettier --check package.json apps/web/package.json apps/extension/package.json packages/api-client/package.json packages/ui/package.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.final.json apps/web/tsconfig.json apps/extension/tsconfig.json packages/api-client/tsconfig.json packages/ui/tsconfig.json eslint.config.js .prettierrc.json scripts apps/web/src apps/extension/src packages/ui/src packages/api-client/src/index.ts packages/api-client/src/operatorError.ts
scripts.format: prettier --write package.json apps/web/package.json apps/extension/package.json packages/api-client/package.json packages/ui/package.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.final.json apps/web/tsconfig.json apps/extension/tsconfig.json packages/api-client/tsconfig.json packages/ui/tsconfig.json eslint.config.js .prettierrc.json scripts apps/web/src apps/extension/src packages/ui/src packages/api-client/src/index.ts packages/api-client/src/operatorError.ts
scripts.test:unit: npm run build --workspace @merida/api-client && npm run check:no-demo && node --test apps/web/src/features/dashboard/dashboardSession.test.ts apps/web/src/shared/api/dashboardClient.test.ts apps/extension/src/session/captureSession.test.ts apps/extension/src/shared/activeTabEvidence.test.ts apps/extension/src/shared/sourceAccess.test.ts apps/extension/src/shared/background.test.ts apps/extension/src/shared/captureClient.test.ts apps/extension/src/shared/captureHealth.test.ts && node scripts/python.mjs -m pytest apps/api/tests
scripts.build: npm run client && npm run build --workspace @merida/web && npm run build --workspace @merida/extension && npm run check:no-demo-builds
scripts.test: npm run check:generated && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run build && npm run check:final-only
